explanation: This command simulates a file download via GfxDownloadWrapper.exe using a URL. It matches the Sigma rule by containing 'http://' in the command line.
This command uses the long-form option '--url' instead of a short flag and includes 'https://', which matches the Sigma rule.
This command omits any flags and directly passes the URL as an argument, matching the Sigma rule by containing 'http://'.
This command uses an escaped backslash in the URL path, which is parsed correctly and still matches the Sigma rule.
This command uses a quoted URL with a trailing slash and an appended filename, which is still parsed correctly and matches the Sigma rule.
